001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import androidx.room.Dao;
005import androidx.room.Insert;
006import androidx.room.Query;
007import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.CandlingObservation;
008import java.util.List;
009
010@Dao
011public interface CandlingObservationDao {
012
013  @Insert
014  long insert(CandlingObservation observation);
015
016  @Query("SELECT * FROM candling_observation WHERE egg_id = :eggId ORDER BY day_number ASC")
017  LiveData<List<CandlingObservation>> selectByEgg(long eggId);
018
019  @Query("SELECT * FROM candling_observation WHERE observation_id = :id")
020  LiveData<CandlingObservation> select(long id);
021
022}
